name: pi-agentflow
description: Isolated child-agent and dynamic workflow runtime for Pi

scripts.format: cd ../.. && extensions/agentflow/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt extensions/agentflow/src extensions/agentflow/test extensions/agentflow/scripts extensions/agentflow/package.json extensions/agentflow/tsconfig.json extensions/markdown-context-imports.ts lib instructions AGENTS.md
scripts.format:check: cd ../.. && extensions/agentflow/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/agentflow/src extensions/agentflow/test extensions/agentflow/scripts extensions/agentflow/package.json extensions/agentflow/tsconfig.json extensions/markdown-context-imports.ts lib instructions AGENTS.md
